title: Discuss travel style
subtitle: Compare planned and flexible travel.
overview: Travel opinions are perfect B1 practice.
Explain your preference and give an example.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: it gives me peace of mind

items.es: Prefiero reservar el hotel antes de viajar porque me da tranquilidad.
items.en: I prefer to book the hotel before traveling because it gives me peace of mind.

items.es: Sin embargo, me gusta dejar tiempo libre para explorar.
items.en: However, I like to leave free time to explore.

items.es: Viajar con todo organizado puede ser cómodo, pero menos espontáneo.
items.en: Traveling with everything organized can be convenient, but less spontaneous.

items.es: Depende del destino y de la duración del viaje.
items.en: It depends on the destination and the length of the trip.
In general, I look for a balance.
